summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-6, REQ-7, REQ-8) for reducing header vertical spacing and creating a more compact layout. The changes are evidenced in the Header.tsx file summary, which documents reduced header height (h-52 md:h-60), smaller button sizes (h-10 w-10), smaller icon sizes (h-5 w-5), minimal spacing between stacked elements (gap-1), and reduced spacing between logo and slogan (gap-1.5).
